name: Oidon Co., Ltd.
summary: Oidon Co., Ltd. engages in the planning, development, and supporting of emission trading system. It is also involved in the planning of social infrastructure for low-carbon society. The company was formerly known as Pomsta Group, Inc. and changed its name to Oidon Co., Ltd. in December 2010. Oidon Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
